name: Mesclun w/ Maple Mustard Tofu Points
recipeIngredient: 1 pound extra firm lowfat tofu, frozen, defrosted and drained
1/4 pound mesclun or mixed salad greens
roasted red bell pepper strips -- about 16
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Line a broiling pan with aluminum foil.
3. Mash and mix the soy sauce, mustard, miso, maple syrup, water, and sesame oil until thoroughly blended.
4. Press the tofu between 2 plates, 4 or 5 times, until all the water is released.
5. Cut the tofu crosswise into 8 slices, about 1/2 inch thick. Cut each slice on the diagonal, creating triangles.
6. Dip the triangles into the tofu mixture and coat all sides.
7. Broil until lightly browned and slightly crusty on the first side, about 3-4 minutes.
8. Turn the tofu over. Brush any remaining marinade onto the tofu, and broil the second side until it is browned, about 3 minutes.
- For a more barbecue taste, broil the tofu until slightly blackened around the edges.
9. Serve either warm or room temperature on top of mesclun, red peppers, and seasoned rice vinegar.
